name: Water Block
description: Water blocks sit on the grid and block boxes below them. Clear a path of empty cells from the bottom row up to a water cluster, and all connected water blocks drain away — like water finding its way through pipes!
howToPlay: Tap boxes to clear them and create empty cells. Build a connected path of empty spaces from the bottom row up to the water blocks (the blue ~ cells). The path can zigzag — it doesn't need to be straight. Once a path reaches any water block in a connected group, the whole group drains away, unblocking the boxes underneath.

showcaseLevel.name: Water Demo
showcaseLevel.desc: Clear a path to drain the water!
